title: Standalone Croissant + Frictionless validator CLI
context: Downstream reusers of the project's derivative datasets need to be able to independently validate that a dataset conforms to the Frictionless Tabular Data Package spec and the Croissant ML metadata spec, without having to set up the full build harness. A standalone validator CLI enables any reuser to run a quick conformance check against the pinned spec versions used in this project.
objective: Implement a standalone TypeScript/ESM CLI that validates a derivative dataset's datapackage.json (Frictionless) and Croissant metadata against the pinned spec versions used by this project.
acceptanceCriteria: CLI accepts a path to a dataset directory and validates: datapackage.json against Frictionless Tabular Data Package v1 spec, and Croissant JSON-LD against Croissant ML v1.0 spec.
Reports PASS or FAIL with specific violations; exit code 0 on PASS, 1 on FAIL.
Tests include: known-valid dataset (golden fixture from harness-006), deliberately malformed Frictionless descriptor, deliberately malformed Croissant metadata.
pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint pass; code is MIT-licensed; no credentials committed; commit is DCO signed-off.
resources: Frictionless Data — Tabular Data Package specification
output: A merged PR adding a standalone Croissant + Frictionless validator CLI with CI-green tests against golden fixtures and known-bad inputs.
